words.hint: W końcu zobaczyłem go z krwi i kości.
words.answer: I finally saw him in the flesh.
He slightly changed his tone of voice.

words.hint: Zawsze mogę liczyć na mojego brata.
words.answer: I can always count on my brother.

words.hint: Musisz polegać na kimś w trudnych chwilach.
words.answer: You have to rely on someone in difficult times.

words.hint: Ten zawodnik jest faworyzowany przez trenerów.
words.answer: This player is favored by the coaches.

words.hint: Ta metoda jest preferowana przez ekspertów.
words.answer: This method is preferred by experts.
He was often ridiculed at school.

words.hint: Mam silne przekonanie, że to się uda.
words.answer: I have a strong conviction that it will work.
The indications are clear and specific.
We need to schedule the meeting.
I want to plan every step carefully.
The deadline for the project is Friday.
He received a reward for the best idea.

Therefore, there is no other option.

words.hint: To odległy kraj, trudno tam dotrzeć.
words.answer: It’s a distant country, hard to reach.
They live in a remote mountain region.
We need to condense the data before sending.

words.hint: To był szalony pomysł, ale zadziałał.
words.answer: It was a crazy idea, but it worked.

I try to avoid conflicts.
We need to group the data by category.

words.hint: Widok był wzniosły i zapierał dech.
words.answer: The view was sublime and breathtaking.

words.hint: Działa to w ramach ustalonego systemu.
words.answer: It works within the framework of an established system.

words.hint: Dali nam zachętę do dalszej pracy.
words.answer: They gave us an incentive to continue working.

words.hint: Ma wnikliwy umysł i szybko analizuje.
words.answer: He has a keen mind and analyzes quickly.

words.hint: Ten atut może zadecydować o sukcesie.
words.answer: This asset may determine success.

words.hint: To dobre odniesienie do wcześniejszych badań.
words.answer: It’s a good reference to previous studies.
